title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 426.240 - Judgment certified to assignee and claim allowed, when
text:
426.240.  Judgment certified to assignee and claim allowed, when. — All judgments rendered in favor of any claimant in the circuit court by virtue of the provisions of this chapter, shall be certified by the clerk thereof to the assignee, who shall allow the same, and class it as if such judgment had been rendered by him on the original hearing thereof.
(RSMo 1939 § 5762) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 5652; 1919 § 648; 1909 § 921
